phoneNumber.description: Active military or civil telecommunication channel

location.description: Primary airspace division or deployment quadrant

certificationTargetDate.description: FAA Part 107 target certification calendar date

profilePhoto.description: Base64 or URL link for pilot insignia avatar image

UserProgress.title: UserProgress

uid.description: Owner identifier matching the user's Firebase UID

completedQuestions.description: Record mapping question ID to selected option index

examAttempts.description: Historic practice exam scores and timestamps

studyProgress.description: Record mapping concept ID to mastered state

studyConfidence.description: Record mapping concept ID to confidence level

studyNotes.description: Record mapping concept ID to personal study observations

/users/{userId}.description: Isolated profiles containing dynamic crew details

/progress/{userId}.description: State telemetry matching individual progress metrics
